metadata.title: Oxford English Primary 4 (Shanghai Edition)
metadata.subtitle: 牛津上海版小学英语四年级上册

unit1.name: Hello
unit1.topic: 学习问候语和自我介绍

unit2.name: Nice to meet you
unit2.topic: 学习如何介绍自己和他人

unit5.name: My friends
unit5.topic: 学习描述朋友的特征和爱好

unit6.name: My teachers
unit6.topic: 学习描述老师的外貌和性格

unit7.name: At school
unit7.topic: 学习学校相关的词汇和表达

vocabulary.exampleSentence: I go to school every day.
I read books in the library.
Meet me at the school gate.
The teacher writes on the blackboard.

unit8.name: In the classroom
unit8.topic: 学习教室物品和课堂指令

vocabulary.exampleSentence: I carry my bag to school.
We watch TV in the living room.
My mother cooks in the kitchen.
I wash my hands in the bathroom.
There are many flowers in the garden.
The food is in the fridge.
There is a bed in my room.

unit10.name: Animals
unit10.topic: 学习常见动物名称和特征

vocabulary.exampleSentence: The lion is the king of animals.
The zebra has black and white stripes.
I water the plant every day.
There are many flowers in the garden.
What is the weather like today?
It is very hot in summer.
It is very cold in winter.
